reason: This finding involves a standard SSH hardening measure by setting X11UseLocalhost to yes, which prevents remote hosts from connecting to the proxy display. It aligns with common STIG hardening patterns for SSH configurations and poses minimal risk of causing lockout or service disruption, as it only restricts X11 forwarding without affecting core SSH authentication or connectivity.
estimated_impact: networking affected; filesystems affected; X11 forwarding functionality may be limited for remote users who require it.; Requires SSH service restart to apply changes, which could briefly interrupt active sessions.
